primary_sources.name: KDIGO 2024 Clinical Practice Guideline for the Evaluation and Management of Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive guidance on medication management and dosing adjustments in CKD patients

primary_sources.name: Drug Dosing Adjustments in Patients with Chronic Kidney Disease
primary_sources.relevance: Evidence-based recommendations for renal dosing adjustments across medication classes

primary_sources.name: Nephrotoxicity of Common Drugs Used in Clinical Practice
primary_sources.relevance: Comprehensive review of drug-induced nephrotoxicity mechanisms and prevention strategies

primary_sources.name: KDOQI Clinical Practice Guidelines for Medication Management in Patients with CKD
primary_sources.relevance: Specific guidance on medication reconciliation and safety practices in nephrology

secondary_sources.name: Pharmacokinetics and Drug Dosing in Patients with Kidney Disease
secondary_sources.organization: Journal of the American Society of Nephrology
secondary_sources.relevance: Detailed pharmacokinetic principles for dialysis patients and advanced CKD

gaps: Limited recent guidelines specifically addressing medication management in acute kidney injury
Emerging data on novel diabetes medications and SGLT2 inhibitors in advanced CKD
